paymentMethods.title: Payment Gateways

chargily.name: Chargily
chargily.description: Receive payments online in Algeria—no business license required.

p2p.name: P2P Transfer
p2p.description: Direct transfers via digital wallets and local banking apps.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.description: Accept payments and manage operations globally and securely.

security.title: Payment Security
security.description: All payment methods use encryption to protect your data.

status.activeDescription: Your account is connected to Chargily and you can now receive payments
status.inactiveDescription: Account is connected but temporarily disabled - payments will not be processed
status.notConnectedDescription: Complete the steps below to connect your account with Chargily

form.title: API Keys Setup
form.description: Enter your API keys from Chargily dashboard
form.publicKeyHint: Public key is safe to use in frontend
form.secretKeyWarning: Warning: Secret key is very sensitive and should not be shared with anyone. It is encrypted and stored securely.

activeItems: All payments will be processed automatically
You will receive notifications for new payments
inactiveItems: Customers will not be able to pay via Chargily
You can enable it again at any time

security.title: Security Information
items: All keys are protected with AES-256 encryption
Keys are securely stored in the database
Secure connection with Chargily servers via HTTPS
You can temporarily disable payment without losing settings

steps.title: Steps
steps.step1Description: Go to Chargily dashboard and get API keys
steps.step2Description: Copy and paste keys in required fields
steps.step3Description: Click save changes to complete connection
steps.step4Description: Use switch to enable or disable payment

status.activeDescription: Customers can now make P2P bank transfers
status.inactiveDescription: Bank account is connected but temporarily disabled - transfers will not be processed

form.title: Bank Transfer Setup (P2P)
form.description: Enter your bank account details to receive money

form.bankDetailsPlaceholder: Write additional bank details (e.g., Swift, IBAN)

activeItems: Customers can see bank account details
Transfer instructions will be displayed to customers
You will need to manually confirm receipt of transfers
inactiveItems: Customers will not be able to see account details
Bank transfer option will not be displayed
You can enable it again at any time

security.title: Security and Privacy Information
items: Bank account details are securely stored and encrypted
Information will not be shared with third parties
You can temporarily disable payment without losing settings

steps.title: Steps
steps.step1Description: Account holder name, bank, and account number
